title: Stars Atlas App Config
description: Application, README, site, and classification settings for the generated stars atlas.

$schema.description: Relative path to this schema file so editors can validate config/config.json.

github.description: GitHub account settings used to fetch starred repositories and derive profile metadata.

classification.description: Controls the optional README-assisted fallback categorization behavior.

readme.description: Content settings used when regenerating the repository README.

site.description: Frontend shell, SEO, and manifest settings for the generated static site.

trimmedString.description: Non-empty string that should contain at least one non-whitespace character.

githubUsername.description: GitHub username or organization login used for starred repository lookup.

confidenceThreshold.description: Confidence cutoff below which README fallback categorization becomes eligible.

enableReadmeFallback.description: When true, low-confidence repositories may fetch README content transiently to improve categorization.

title.description: Top-level title used in the generated README.

description.description: Short summary shown near the top of the generated README.
Default meta description for the generated site.

ogDescription.description: Open Graph description used for link previews.

twitterCard.description: Twitter card type, for example summary_large_image.

socialImageUrl.description: Absolute URL for the social preview image.

iconUrl.description: Absolute URL for the manifest/app icon source.

shortName.description: Short application name used in the web manifest.

description.description: Manifest description shown by install surfaces.

title.description: Base site title used in the browser title and generated metadata.

heroTitle.description: Headline text used in the site hero section.

heroDescription.description: Supporting hero copy shown on the landing section.

profileLinkLabel.description: Label for the GitHub profile link shown in the site shell.
